models package¶

Submodules¶

models.task module¶

class models.task.Task(id, title, date, status='in progres')[source]¶

Bases: object

Represents a single task in the to-do list.

id¶

Unique identifier of the task

Type:

int

title¶

Task title or description

Type:

str

date¶

Due date of the task

Type:

date | str

status¶

Current status of the task (default: “in progres”)

Type:

str

is_done()[source]¶

Checks whether the task is completed.

Returns:

True if task status is ‘done’, otherwise False

models.vacation module¶

class models.vacation.ActivityCard(activity_data, db=None, screen=None, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: MDCard

Custom UI card used to display a vacation activity.

Provides: - Activity details (time, name, location, notes) - Delete functionality with confirmation dialog

confirm_delete(*args)[source]¶

Opens a confirmation dialog before deleting the activity.

delete_activity(*args)[source]¶

Deletes the activity from the database and removes the card with animation.

remove_from_parent()[source]¶

Removes the card from its parent layout.

class models.vacation.Itinerary(id, vacation_id, day, start_time, end_time, activity, location, notest)[source]¶

Bases: object

Represents an activity planned during a vacation day.

class models.vacation.Vacation(id, destination, start_date, end_date)[source]¶

Bases: object

Represents a vacation entity.

id¶

Unique identifier of the vacation

Type:

int

destination¶

Vacation destination (country, city)

Type:

str

start_date¶

Start date of the vacation

Type:

str | date

end_date¶

End date of the vacation

Type:

str | date
